name: Seamico Capital Public Company Limited
summary: Seamico Capital Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the securities business in Thailand. The company offers securities brokerage, securities and derivatives trading, investment advisory, securities underwriting, financial advisory, derivatives agency, online securities trading, securities borrowing and lending, wealth advisory, international market securities trading, and derivative warrants, as well as mutual, private, and provident fund management services. It is also involved in the foreign exchange business. The company was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
